nodes.name: 西仓鸮
nodes.summary: 西仓鸮（Western barn owl，学名 Tyto alba），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于蘭開夏、喬瓦尼·安東尼奧·斯科波利，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁，主要威胁包括农药污染。
locations: 喬瓦尼·安東尼奧·斯科波利

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 蘭開夏
nodes.summary: 蘭開夏是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括鸳鸯、西仓鸮，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.id: loc-喬瓦尼-安東尼奧-斯科波利-63de771d
nodes.name: 喬瓦尼·安東尼奧·斯科波利
nodes.summary: 喬瓦尼·安東尼奧·斯科波利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Seychelles blue pigeon、西仓鸮、黑兀鹫等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The western barn owl (Tyto alba) is a species of barn owl native to Europe, southwestern Asia, and Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The western barn owl (Tyto alba) is a species of barn owl native to Europe, southwestern Asia, and Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Breeding takes place at varying times of the year, according to the locality, with a clutch of eggs, averaging about four in number, being laid in a nest in a hollow tree, old building, or fissure in a cliff

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to their assignment to the nominate subspecies, which is common in mainland Spain, the western Canary Islands population is not classified as threatened. In the United Kingdom, the "Barn Owl Nest Box Scheme" is promoted by the World Owl Trust and has many participants in local areas such as Somerset, where a webcam has been set up inside a nest box in which seven young were reared in 2014. In May 2012, it was revealed that farmers in Israel and Jordan had, over a period of ten years, replaced pesticides with barn owls in a joint conservation venture called "Project Barn Owl"
